title: verbascum adeliae
intro: Verbascum adeliae, also known as Adelia's mullein or mullein, is a flowering plant species within the figwort family native to South Africa. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Traditionally, Verbascum adeliae has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used topically to soothe and heal skin irritations.
